title: Smoked Ethiopian Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the rich flavors of Ethiopia with the smokiness of grilled lamb. Serve as an appetizer or main course.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure the lamb is at room temperature before assembling skewers.

ingredients.name: Skewers for lamb
ingredients.notes: Wooden or metal, depending on preference.

ingredients.name: Onion, peeled and chopped
ingredients.notes: Red or yellow onion works well.

ingredients.name: Bell pepper, chopped
ingredients.notes: Any color, e.g., red, yellow, or orange.

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Ethiopian spice blend, salt, and pepper.
Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with vegetable oil and sprinkle with spice blend mixture.
Grill skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Meanwhile, grill onion, garlic, and bell pepper until tender.
Once lamb is cooked, let it rest for 2-3 minutes before slicing.
Serve skewers with grilled vegetables and garnish with lemon zest and chopped cilantro.
Optional: Serve with a side of injera or rice for a more authentic Ethiopian meal.
